name: GOLTZ-GORLIN SYNDROME
definition: FOCAL DERMAL HYPOPLASIA X-linked dominant connective tissue genodermatosis

demographics.Genetics: defect in PORCN gene encoding a key protein involved in developmental Wnt

discriminating_features: osteopathia striata = bilateral symmetric vertical metaphyseal striations of long bones with
"lobster claw" deformity = split hands and feet

general: osteopathia striata = bilateral symmetric vertical metaphyseal striations of long bones with
"lobster claw" deformity = split hands and feet
